# CGDisplayStreamUpdateRectType.movedRects

**Case**

The rectangles for the portions of the display that were simply moved from one part of the display to another.

## Declaration

```swift
case movedRects
```

## Constants

- **CGDisplayStreamUpdateRectType.refreshedRects**: The rectangles for the portions of the display that were redrawn.
- **CGDisplayStreamUpdateRectType.dirtyRects**: The union of both rectangles that were redrawn and rectangles that were moved.
- **CGDisplayStreamUpdateRectType.reducedDirtyRects**: The union is calculated and then simplified. This reduces the number of rectangles returned to your app, but it may report some pixels that were not actually changed.
